mapper.select: SELECT ir.*, dv.generic_name as vaccine_name FROM immunization_records ir LEFT JOIN drugs_vaccines dv ON ir.vaccine_id = dv.id ORDER BY ir.event_time DESC
SELECT ir.*, dv.generic_name as vaccine_name FROM immunization_records ir LEFT JOIN drugs_vaccines dv ON ir.vaccine_id = dv.id WHERE ir.ear_tag = #{earTag} ORDER BY ir.event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO immunization_records (ear_tag, vaccine_id, event_time, dosage, operator, notes) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{vaccineId}, #{eventTime}, #{dosage}, #{operator}, #{notes})
